title: Assertion fault on a dodgy CREATE TABLE statement using WITHOUT ROWID
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY UNIQUE, b) WITHOUT ROWID;
description:
drh added on 2017-07-30 18:25:00:
The following SQL leads to an assertion fault:
CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY UNIQUE, b) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE INDEX t1x ON t1(x);
This problem appears in all versions of SQLite that support WITHOUT ROWID
tables, which is to say all versions since 3.8.2 (2013-12-06).
This problem was discovered by OSSFuzz.
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE statement using WITHOUT ROWID causes assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a TEXT, b INTEGER, c REAL, d BOOLEAN) WITHOUT ROWID;
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c, d) VALUES ('test', NULL, 3.14, 1);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE b IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3(e INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, f TEXT, g REAL) WITHOUT ROWID;
